display.purpose: Instrument Serif. Marketing & candidate-landing hero headlines only; fluid clamp permitted on brand surfaces.

headline.purpose: Instrument Sans 600. Product page titles and section openers; fixed rem.

title.purpose: Instrument Sans 600. Card titles, panel headers, table-group labels.

body.purpose: Instrument Sans 400 with ss01/ss02. Default reading text; cap prose 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Instrument Sans 600, tracked uppercase. Occasional kickers, badges, column heads - never above every section.

mono.purpose: JetBrains Mono 500. Numerics, money, IDs, credit balances, timestamps, code.

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Modals, dialogs, popovers - content that has left the page plane (Tailwind shadow-xl).

shadows.name: nav-active-lift
shadows.purpose: The selected sidebar item on the navy frame - a quiet pressed-in cue.

shadows.name: subtle
shadows.purpose: Sparingly, on a small set of raised cards that need more separation than a border (Tailwind shadow-sm).

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Signature easing - button lift, fades (fadeInUp), link underline, arrow slide, scroll reveals.

motion.name: ease-mask
motion.purpose: Mask/clip-path reveals (load-reveal, mask-reveal) on brand surfaces.

motion.name: state-200
motion.purpose: Default duration for state transitions (hover/focus colour shifts) across the product UI.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single primary action. Solid Cobalt, tactile lift on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; background: #2c5bff; color: #fff; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1a45d4; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(44,91,255,0.35); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Low-emphasis / Cancel action. Transparent, fills with Cool Slate on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; background: transparent; color: #2f3941; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f0f3f7; color: #11123c; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(44,91,255,0.25); }

components.name: Danger Button
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; background: #c02616; color: #fff; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: rgba(192,38,22,0.9); } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(192,38,22,0.3); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard field. Faint Cool-Slate fill, hairline border, Cobalt focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 260px; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d1dce6; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(240,243,247,0.4); color: #11123c; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s, background 0.2s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9fb5c4; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #2c5bff; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(44,91,255,0.2); background: #fff; }

components.name: Tier Badge
components.description: Soft-tint pill: tinted bg + matching deep text. Shown as the Premium variant.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 4px 12px; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-badge-premium { background: #e8eeff; color: #1a45d4; }

components.name: Soft-Tint Callout
components.description: Status message pattern: tinted background + matching deep text + thin matching-hue border. Never a side-stripe. Shown as success.
components.html: Candidate shortlisted and moved to review.
components.css: .ds-callout { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 16px; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.82rem; } .ds-callout-success { background: #d0f0de; color: #066b44; border: 1px solid rgba(10,138,90,0.25); }

components.name: Card
components.description: White surface on the Cool-Slate canvas. Flat at rest; hairline border carries separation.
components.html:
Senior Backend Engineer

42 applicants · 6 shortlisted · closes in 4 days
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #d1dce6; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; max-width: 320px; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #11123c; } .ds-card-body { margin: 6px 0 0; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #5a6b7a; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item (active)
components.description: Drenched navy app frame. Active item lifts faintly with an Electric-Teal dot pinned right.
components.html: DashboardCampaigns
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; width: 208px; padding: 12px; background: #11123c; border-radius: 12px; } .ds-nav-item { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); color: #fff; } .ds-nav-item-active { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); color: #fff; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px -4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); } .ds-nav-dot { position: absolute; right: 12px; width: 4px; height: 4px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #05dbd6; }

narrative.overview: TalentStream is a precision recruiting instrument laid out on a calm, cool field. The working surface is a quiet blue-grey canvas - never white, never warm - and against that calm, two saturated colours appear rarely and on purpose: Cobalt Signal for the one action that matters, Electric Teal for the one thing worth noticing. This mirrors the logo (a funnel of muted bars narrowing to a single bright signal dot) and the product's first principle: decisions, not data dumps. The personality is confident, warm, and precise - a senior recruiter who knows hiring cold but speaks plainly and treats people, not rows, as the subject. Components are tactile and confident - primary actions are solid and present, they lift on hover, arrows slide, links draw their own underline - but the restraint is in where that energy is spent, never on decoration. It rejects generic AI SaaS, legacy enterprise HR, and the cold clinical ATS.
keyCharacteristics: Cool blue-grey canvas (#f0f3f7), never white or warm - the calm field that makes signals read.
Two rationed accents: Cobalt Signal (action/brand) + Electric Teal (the one thing to notice).
Deep Midnight Indigo ink (#11123c) and a navy app frame; depth from tone, not shadow.
Instrument Serif display against Instrument Sans body - editorial authority, humanist warmth.
Flat by default; shadow is a response to state. Tactile, lifting components.
Semantic status vocabulary (moss/saffron/red) as soft-tint callouts, never side-stripes.

rules.name: The Two-Signal Rule
rules.body: Only two saturated colours exist - Cobalt and Electric Teal - and together they cover well under 10% of any screen. Status hues are functional, not part of the brand palette. If a screen looks colourful, signals have stopped being signals; pull back.

rules.name: The Cool-Field Rule
rules.body: The body background is Cool Slate (#f0f3f7), never white and never warm-tinted. Warmth lives in the status set and the serif, not the canvas. A warm or cream background is forbidden - it breaks the instrument.

rules.name: The Fixed-Scale Rule
rules.body: Inside the product app, type sizes are fixed rem, not fluid. clamp() headings belong on brand surfaces only - a fluid h1 that shrinks inside a sidebar looks worse, not designed.

rules.name: The Serif-Is-For-Voice Rule
rules.body: Instrument Serif is for display and editorial voice. Never set UI labels, buttons, inputs, or table data in the serif - that's the product-register tell to avoid.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. If you reach for a shadow on a resting card, reach for a border or a tonal step first. Shadow appears only when something is genuinely above the page (overlay) or responding to state.

rules.name: The Teal-On-Dark Rule
rules.body: Bright Electric Teal text and icons only read on dark surfaces (~10:1 on the navy band/cards); on the light canvas teal falls to ~1.6:1. Reserve teal for dark backgrounds and use Cobalt as the accent on light.

dos: Do keep the body background Cool Slate (#f0f3f7) - never white, never warm/cream.
Do ration the two signals: Cobalt for the primary action, Electric Teal for the one thing to notice. Together under ~10% of a screen.
Do render status as soft-tint callouts: tinted background + matching deep text + a thin matching-hue border (e.g. bg-moss-soft + text-moss-deep + border-moss/25).
Do keep depth tonal (navy frame -> slate canvas -> white surface). Reserve shadow for overlays and state.
Do let primary actions feel tactile - solid fill, hover-deepen, .lift and arrow-slide on confident CTAs - within a single consistent button shape.
Do set Instrument Serif for display/editorial voice and Instrument Sans for all UI text and data.
Do pair every status hue with an icon or label, not colour alone (WCAG 2.2 AA; candidates are a broad public audience).
Do keep body text at Ink Muted (#5a6b7a) or darker for >=4.5:1 contrast.
donts: Don't ship generic AI SaaS: no indigo-on-white sameness, no identical rounded-card grids, no gradient blobs, no hero-metric template.

Don't stamp a tracked uppercase eyebrow above every section - the .eyebrow is an occasional device, not section scaffolding. No 01/02/03 numbered markers unless the content truly is an ordered sequence.
Don't drift toward legacy enterprise HR (Workday/Taleo/SAP) form-soup or joyless corporate grey, or a cold clinical ATS that renders candidates as faceless rows.
Don't use border-left/border-right > 1px as a coloured accent stripe on cards, callouts, or alerts - use the soft-tint formula instead.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text), decorative glassmorphism, or neon/crypto theatrics.
Don't set UI labels, buttons, or table data in Instrument Serif. Serif is voice, not chrome.
Don't put body text in Ink Faint (#9fb5c4) - it fails contrast. It's for placeholders, disabled, and decorative strokes only.

Don't gate content visibility on a scroll/class-triggered reveal (e.g. .animate-on-scroll { opacity: 0 }) - it ships blank in headless renderers and background tabs. Reveals must enhance an already-visible default.
Don't scatter ambient shadows on resting cards - that's the dated-app tell.
